description: Example payload sent to API endpoint on form submission

field_descriptions.utm_source: UTM source parameter from URL (empty string if not present)
field_descriptions.utm_campaign: UTM campaign parameter from URL (empty string if not present)
field_descriptions.utm_adset: UTM adset parameter from URL (empty string if not present)
field_descriptions.utm_ad: UTM ad parameter from URL (empty string if not present)
field_descriptions.fbclid: Facebook Click ID from URL (empty string if not present)

notes: All tracking fields (utm_*, fbclid) are automatically extracted from URL parameters
If a tracking parameter is not present in the URL, it will be an empty string
The phone field contains only digits (no spaces, dashes, or parentheses)
The landing_page field identifies which page the user submitted from
Page 2 passes tracking data through to the /form page via URL parameters
